title:
Beth Noveck hangout
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
In February and March 2016 Open Data NZ held a series of conversations with leading international open data experts, including Beth Noveck. These internationally renowned experts talked with New Zealanders about the work happening both here and around the globe, and shared their knowledge and expertise.
Beth Noveck is considered one of today's most innovative thinkers on government reform using digital technologies. Beth's vision of collaborative democracy includes utilising the power of open data to improve collaboration between government and citizens.
View Beth Noveck's hangout, below.
Read: Open data experts hangout with NZ
